summary: Tested trial settings endpoints and Tu Universidad restrictions. Fixed critical bug: unauthenticated users could access university simulations. Also fixed frontend runtime error in Layout.js, Biblioteca.js, and TrialBanner.js where hasActiveSubscription was called as function instead of boolean.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Admin Dashboard and Tu Universidad working correctly

backend_apis.GET /api/admin/analytics/settings/trial: PASS - Returns trial configuration (enabled, trial_days, simulations_limit, university_simulations_limit)
backend_apis.PUT /api/admin/analytics/settings/trial: PASS - Updates trial settings, returns success with updated values
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/analytics/public/trial-st: PASS - Public endpoint returns enabled and trial_days only
backend_apis.POST /api/universities/{id}/courses/{cid: PASS - Now requires authentication (was allowing unauthenticated access before fix)
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/analytics/dashboard: PASS - Returns dashboard metrics including trial_active users count

frontend_admin_dashboard.trial_settings_card: PASS - 'Configuración de Prueba Gratuita' card visible
frontend_admin_dashboard.trial_toggle: PASS - Toggle switch to enable/disable trial works correctly
frontend_admin_dashboard.trial_inputs: PASS - Three number inputs: Días de prueba (7), Límite simulacros normales (10), Límite simulacros universitarios (1)
frontend_admin_dashboard.marketing_tip: PASS - Cyan info box with marketing tip visible

frontend_landing_page.hero_cta: PASS - Shows 'Empieza gratis' when trial enabled
frontend_landing_page.trial_badge: PASS - Shows 'Prueba gratuita de 7 días · Sin tarjeta de crédito'
frontend_landing_page.free_trial_section: PASS - 'Pruébalo gratis por 7 días' section visible when trial enabled
frontend_landing_page.pricing_section: PASS - Two pricing cards displayed correctly

frontend_tu_universidad.paywall_unauthenticated: PASS - Redirects to /auth when not logged in
frontend_tu_universidad.trial_user_access: PASS - Trial users can access page
frontend_tu_universidad.trial_warning: PASS - Shows 'Prueba gratuita: 1 simulacro(s) universitario(s) disponible(s)'
frontend_tu_universidad.university_selection: PASS - Can select university, course, evaluation
frontend_tu_universidad.start_simulation_button: PASS - Button enabled for trial users with remaining simulations

bugs_fixed.issue: CRITICAL: Unauthenticated users could access university simulations
bugs_fixed.fix: Added check at start of generate_simulation: 'if not user: raise HTTPException(403)'

bugs_fixed.issue: Runtime error: hasActiveSubscription is not a function
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed hasActiveSubscription() to hasActiveSubscription (it's exported as boolean, not function)

seed_data_creation: Created test trial user with session_token for browser testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trial settings feature fully implemented and tested. Admin can toggle free trial on/off, set days and simulation limits. Landing page dynamically shows/hides trial content based on settings. Tu Universidad properly restricts access for non-subscribers/non-trial users. Backend now correctly rejects unauthenticated simulation requests with 403.
